name: Apple Cake with Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix all cake ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch oblong pan.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean when inserted in the center of the cake.
5. In a small saucepan, cook the icing ingredients (margarine, brown sugar, and milk) over low heat for 2 to 1/2 minutes.
6. Pour the warm icing over the cake while it is still hot.
